# Designing multi-agent systems: When to split, when to sandbox, what to ship

Connect GitHub repo or paste URL, get fully branded documentation site generated by Claude. Multi-agent architecture: clean context windows, sandboxed agents with unix tools, separate understanding agents from writing agents. Signups doubled since shipping.
